I am currently a moderator for this game and it's really nice sure there isn't much to do, but that's because it's in early access! You get jetpacks,liv camera mod, and a Minecraft mode! Called "The Creation Warehouse" there will be casual events to earn in-game currency soon! This game is really good you should rate 5 starts! And play this game!!!!!!!
